chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Acq. Appeal No.126 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on MA No.2626/2023 2. For orders on MA No.2627/2023 3. For hearing of main case 06.04.2026 Mr. Iftikhar Ahmed Shah, advocate for appellant Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh -------------------------------------- Learned counsel has tried his best, however, has been unable to convince us that there has been any misreading or non-reading of evidence or that there is a jurisdictional issue. Further we have gone through the impugned judgment with the assistance of learned counsel for the appellant and learned Additional Prosecutor General and do not find it capricious, perverse and arbitrary. Needless to say that a total presumption of innocence also works in favour of the appellant. The appeal, yet to be admitted, is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir*
